2605.02728.title: ORPilot: A Production-Oriented Agentic LLM-for-OR Tool for Optimization Modeling
2605.02728.paper_summary: This paper presents ORPilot, an open-source agentic AI system that translates real-world business problems into solver-ready optimization models. Unlike academic LLM-for-OR tools that assume clean problem specifications with preformatted inline data, ORPilot is designed for production conditions: ambiguous descriptions, large-scale raw operational data, and the need for portability across solver backends. The system introduces four novel components: (1) a conversational interview agent to elicit complete problem specifications, (2) a data collection agent that retrieves data independently of prompts, (3) a parameter computation agent to bridge raw tabular data and model-ready parameters, and (4) a solver-agnostic Intermediate Representation (IR) for deterministic, zero-LLM-call recompilation to Gurobi, CPLEX, PuLP, Pyomo, or OR-Tools solvers. Additionally, self-correcting retry loops utilize solver tracebacks for targeted repairs. ORPilot represents the first attempt to target production-level business problems rather than textbook operations research (OR) cases. Evaluation on real-world problems demonstrates promising results. When tested against traditional academic benchmarks: IndustryOR, NL4OPT and NLP4LP, ORPilot outperformed state-of-the-art tools in accuracy on the IndustryOR benchmark and delivered comparable performance on NL4OPT and NLP4LP.
2605.02728.paper_summary_zh: 這篇論文介紹了ORPilot，一個開源的代理型人工智慧系統，將現實世界的商業問題轉換為可供求解的優化模型。與假設問題規格清晰並帶有預格式化內嵌數據的學術LLM-for-OR工具不同，ORPilot是為生產環境設計的：模糊的描述、大規模的原始操作數據，以及在求解器後端之間的可攜性需求。該系統引入了四個新組件：(1) 一個對話式訪談代理，用於引出完整的問題規格，(2) 一個數據收集代理，獨立於提示檢索數據，(3) 一個參數計算代理，將原始表格數據與模型就緒參數連接起來，以及 (4) 一個與求解器無關的中間表示（IR），用於確定性、零LLM調用的重新編譯至Gurobi、CPLEX、PuLP、Pyomo或OR-Tools求解器。此外，自我修正的重試循環利用求解器的回溯進行有針對性的修復。ORPilot代表了首次針對生產級商業問題的嘗試，而不是教科書中的運籌學（OR）案例。對現實世界問題的評估顯示出有希望的結果。在與傳統學術基準：IndustryOR、NL4OPT和NLP4LP的測試中，ORPilot在IndustryOR基準上的準確性超越了最先進的工具，並在NL4OPT和NLP4LP上提供了可比的性能。
2605.02728.author: Guangrui Xie et.al.
